description: StackScript delete (Capability Destroy). Missing stackscript_id, the confirm-only bypass gate, and the success bypass agree across languages; the plain no-confirm message diverges (see report).

cases.name: confirm alone requires a bypass assertion
cases.expect_error:
linode_stackscript_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: deletes a StackScript once confirmed with bypass
